segments.text: Take one young bullock, and two rams without blemish
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: Make unleavened bread, and cakes unleavened tempered with oil, and wafers unleavened anointed with oil of wheaten flour
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: Gird them with girdles, put the bonnets on them: and the priest's office shall be theirs for a perpetual statute: and consecrate Aaron and his sons
segments.speaker: God

footnotes: consecrate: Heb. fill the hand of

segments.text: Take one ram; and Aaron and his sons shall put their hands upon the head of the ram
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: This shall be a continual burnt offering throughout your generations at the door of the tabernacle of the congregation before the LORD: where I will meet you, to speak there unto thee
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: I will dwell among the children of Israel, and will be their God
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: They shall know that I am the LORD their God, that brought them forth out of the land of Egypt, that I may dwell among them: I am the LORD their God
segments.speaker: God
